steps.title: Use the given value
steps.content: The expression asks for $5c-11$, and the equation gives the whole value of $5c$. Since $5c=30$, substitute $30$ for $5c$ directly.

steps.title: Compute the expression
steps.content: Now subtract $11$ from the given value of $5c$: $$5c-11=30-11=19$$ The requested value is $19$. The answer is B.
